flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at MCPHS University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.8k → $40.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at MCPHS University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.8k → $40.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at MCPHS University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (63.3% vs 69.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at MCPHS University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
